items.title: If Users Conceal the Recording Light on Smart Glasses, Meta Says It Will Disable the Camera
items.summary: Meta is listening to the criticism of its smart glasses and says it will disable the camera if the user attempts to conceal the blinking LED light that indicates the device is recording. [Read More]

items.title: AulGo Pocket Camera Hits Kickstarter – 4K Sony Sensor, 6-Axis EIS, 56g Body
items.summary: A new Hong Kong startup called TriLife has taken its AulGo pocket camera to Kickstarter, promising 4K capture from a Sony IMX486 sensor, 6-axis electronic stabilization, and five recording modes in a…

items.title: Venus Williams-backed WeWard can now lock your apps until you hit your steps
items.summary: With funding from tennis star and angel investor Venus Williams, the French app WeWard says that it increases walking time by almost 25%.

items.title: Former OpenAI exec Kevin Weil is now on the board of Stoke Space
items.summary: Kevin Weil's new role at Stoke Space suggests reusable rockets are the next hot thing in Silicon Valley.

items.title: Valerie Brathwaite, Abstract Sculptor of the Natural World, Dies at 87
items.summary: The artist found inspiration in the geography, vegetation, and wildlife of her home countries of Trinidad and Tobago and Venezuela.
